blueprint.name: Auto Ceiling Fan Controller
blueprint.description: This blueprint automatically controls one or more ceiling fans based on the temperature difference between the ceiling and the ambient temperature. Without an AC mode entity, it determines the rotation direction based on the season, automatically detecting the hemisphere from your Home Assistant location. It supports two fan speeds (normal and fast), with an optional silent mode that limits the fans to normal speed only.
input.fan_entities.name: Fans to control
input.fan_entities.description: Select one or more ceiling fan entities or fan groups to control with this automation.
input.temp_sensors.name: Temperature sensors
input.temp_sensors.description: Select temperature sensors and/or sensor groups. The automation computes min and max from all values (expanding groups automatically). At least 2 distinct temperature values are required for the automation to work.
input.climate_control.name: AC mode control
input.ac_mode_selector.name: AC mode entity (optional)
input.ac_mode_selector.description: An input_select indicating the current AC mode (Heating / Cooling / Off). If not set, the rotation direction is determined automatically by season, based on your Home Assistant location (northern hemisphere: November–March = reverse; southern hemisphere: May–September = reverse).
input.ac_state_heating.name: Heating state value
input.ac_state_heating.description: The exact input_select value indicating heating mode. The fan rotates in reverse.
input.ac_state_cooling.name: Cooling state value
input.ac_state_cooling.description: The exact input_select value indicating cooling mode. The fan rotates forward.
input.ac_state_off.name: Off state value
input.ac_state_off.description: The exact input_select value indicating the system is off. The fan stops regardless of the temperature delta.
input.threshold_settings.name: Temperature thresholds
input.threshold_off.name: Off threshold
input.threshold_off.description: The fan turns off when the temperature delta falls below this value.
input.threshold_normal.name: Normal speed threshold
input.threshold_normal.description: The fan starts at normal speed when the delta exceeds this value.
input.threshold_fast.name: Fast speed threshold
input.threshold_fast.description: The fan switches to fast speed when the delta exceeds this value (disabled during silent mode).
input.speed_settings.name: Fan speeds
input.speed_normal.name: Normal speed
input.speed_normal.description: Fan percentage used in normal running conditions.
input.speed_fast.name: Fast speed
input.speed_fast.description: Fan percentage used when the delta exceeds the fast speed threshold (not used during silent mode).
input.silent_mode_section.name: Silent mode
input.silent_mode_entity.name: Silent mode entity
input.silent_mode_entity.description: An input_boolean or binary_sensor that enables silent mode (e.g. TV on). When active, the fan is limited to normal speed only. Leave empty to disable.
input.eval_interval.name: Re-evaluation interval
input.eval_interval.description: How often the automation re-evaluates the fan state. An immediate evaluation is still triggered on HA start, and on every AC mode or silent mode change.
